title: neorudolphia volubilis
intro: Neorudolphia volubilis, also known as the "Mastic Tree" or "Neorudolphia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Caribbean. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil which has antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neorudolphia volubilis include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and fight off infections, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Neorudolphia volubilis include essential oil, extracts, and teas, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
